investigated: Pipeline calibration (seed-000), PEAD for mega-cap S&P 500 stocks with >10% EPS beats (seed-001), S&P 500 index addition effect (seed-002), FDA PDUFA decision literature review (seed-003)
findings: PIPELINE: Calibrated successfully - META Feb 2023 (+21.82% measured vs +23% actual), GOOGL Oct 2022 (-8.38% measured vs -9% actual), NVDA Feb 2024 (+14.33% measured vs +16% actual). All match expected direction and magnitude. PEAD DEAD END: No post-earnings drift for mega-cap S&P 500 with >10% EPS beats. Discovery set (2021-2022, n=20): avg 1d abnormal = +1.05%, positive rate = 45% (below random!), 1d→5d drift = -0.94% (mean reversion). Financials (GS/MS 2020-2021, n=13): avg 1d = +0.40%, drift = -1.50%. Not significant. 2023-2024 tech shows strong returns (+8.37%) but confounded by AI/META theme. INDEX ADDITION EFFECT CONFIRMED: Discovery (2020-2022, n=15): avg 1d abnormal = +4.09%, 5d = +5.52%, 73% positive rate. Validation (2023-2024, n=10): avg 1d = +8.05%, 5d = +10.23%, 100% positive rate. Both pass multiple testing. Hypothesis 061ae3a8 created (confidence 9/10). FDA LITERATURE: Effect size-dependent - large pharma approval near-zero (+0.4%), small biotech +8-11% vs pharma. Rejection (CRL) = -4.3% to -9.2%, asymmetrically larger. Continued drift for 2+ weeks post-rejection.
surprised_by: Two big surprises: (1) PEAD showed NEGATIVE abnormal returns on day 1 for large-cap beats (45% positive rate, below random). Classic 'sell the news' - these beats were fully priced in or exceeded by whisper numbers. (2) S&P 500 addition effect is CLEARLY ALIVE in 2020-2024 despite Greenwood & Sammon (2025 JF) claiming it disappeared by 2020. Validation set actually showed STRONGER effect than discovery (100% positive rate vs 73%). The growth of passive investing may be re-amplifying the forced buying effect. Need to monitor whether next non-thematic addition also shows the pattern.
next_step: Morning session: check if any March 2026 S&P 500 announcement was missed (Q1 rebalance may have just occurred). Research session: backtest FDA CRL rejection for small biotech (including delisted companies), test S&P 500 deletion effect, test post-effective-date reversal for additions. When next S&P 500 addition announced, place $5000 paper trade immediately.

investigated:
(1) March 2026 S&P 500 additions live validation (VRT, LITE, COHR, SATS), 
(2) S&P 500 deletion effect backtest (N=21, 2021-2026),
(3) S&P 500 post-effective-date reversal test (N=24, 2020-2024),
(4) FDA small biotech CRL (Complete Response Letter) backtest (N=8 measured + 4 delisted, 2018-2025)
findings:
MARCH 2026 LIVE VALIDATION: All 4 S&P 500 additions positive (VRT +8.46%, LITE +13.85%, COHR +6.17%, SATS +2.59%), avg +7.77% 1d abnormal. 5-day window already passed (Mar 9-13). Confirms hypothesis 061ae3a8.

DELETION EFFECT: Dead end. 1d avg=-0.44% (p=0.59), positive_rate=52%. Validation set 2024-2026: 1d avg=+0.27% (POSITIVE!), 3d passes Bonferroni within full set but not in OOS. Many deleted stocks RISE on Day 1 as contrarian buyers offset index fund selling. Selection bias is severe.

POST-EFFECTIVE REVERSAL: NOT present. 1d avg=-0.61% (p=0.36), 20d avg=+1.16% (p=0.70). Addition gains are PERMANENT (investor recognition effect). No need to sell before effective date.

FDA CRL BACKTEST: Generic CRL short = dead end. CMC-only CRLs (AXSM +4.8%, SRRK +4.1%) show POSITIVE 1d returns. Clinical CRLs show high variance: OTLK -81%, APLT -77% vs ITRM +18%, NERV +1.2%. Survivorship bias severe: 4/12 tickers delisted (SESN -80% known, ATNX -21% known, ICPT unknown, CORV -1.5%). True effect MORE negative than measured. Dead end for generic CRL short. Refined hypothesis (single-asset + clinical CRL) queued for future research.
surprised_by:
1. S&P 500 DELETION effect: Day 1 is essentially FLAT (52% positive, avg -0.44%). Many stocks go UP on deletion announcement as contrarian buyers see 'oversold' stocks. The deletion creates a 3-day negative drift but not a reliable 1-day short. The 'obvious' short (index forced selling) doesn't work on Day 1 because the market correctly anticipates buyer interest.

2. CMC-only FDA CRL causes POSITIVE stock reactions (AXSM +4.8%, SRRK +4.1%). This makes fundamental sense: a manufacturing fix is temporary, but the market's ability to distinguish CMC from clinical CRLs in real-time is impressive. Smaller biotechs with clinical issues are not this lucky.

3. The MARCH 2026 additions show the effect is getting STRONGER, not weaker: LITE +13.85%, average +7.77% vs our prior validation set average of +8.05%. The effect was supposed to have disappeared by 2020 (Greenwood & Sammon 2025) but 2026 data shows it very much alive.
next_step: Test mid-cap PEAD (task 9845a59d). Start with S&P 500 components with $5-30B market cap that beat EPS by >10%, find 20+ events from 2020-2024. This is the next highest-priority quantitative test. Also: look for alternative data sources for delisted biotech tickers.

investigated: Insider buying cluster hypothesis feasibility: (1) SEC EDGAR Form 4 data availability and access methods, (2) recent academic evidence on whether signal persists in 2020-2024, (3) specific APIs and tools available, (4) end-to-end pipeline test
findings: FEASIBILITY CONFIRMED. (1) DATA: SEC provides free quarterly bulk ZIP downloads at https://www.sec.gov/files/structureddata/data/insider-transactions-data-sets/{YEAR}q{Q}_form345.zip. Files: NONDERIV_TRANS.tsv has TRANS_CODE (P=open market purchase), TRANS_SHARES, TRANS_PRICEPERSHARE, TRANS_DATE. SUBMISSION.tsv has ISSUERTRADINGSYMBOL (ticker). REPORTINGOWNER.tsv has RPTOWNER_RELATIONSHIP (Director/Officer). Q4 2024 ZIP = 8.5MB compressed, ~55MB uncompressed. URL pattern confirmed working (HTTP 200). (2) PIPELINE TEST: Q4 2024 data yielded 1,330 qualified purchases (code P, >$50K, director/officer) and 487 cluster events in one quarter. Sample: BHVN had 2 insiders each buying $999,970 on same day. (3) TOOLS: edgartools (pip install edgartools, MIT license, free, no API key). EFTS full-text search API works with User-Agent header. (4) ACADEMIC: Kang/Kim/Wang 2018 (1986-2016): cluster purchases 3.8% abnormal/21d vs 2.0% non-cluster. Alldredge/Blank 2017: 2.1% monthly abnormal for clustered. Lakonishok/Lee 2001: 7-8% annual outperformance. SIGNAL DECAY: 2024 study shows raw individual insider signal vanishes with realistic position sizing, negatively correlated with liquidity. CLUSTER-specific decay not studied. 2025 SSRN paper 'Death of Insider Trading Alpha' - most returns occur before public disclosure (i.e., pre-filing). Microcap insider purchase signal persists (2018-2024, n=17,237): 6.3% abnormal CAR for purchases after >10% price surge.
surprised_by: The SEC bulk data is far more accessible than expected - free, structured TSV format, quarterly ZIPs, no API key needed. The EFTS full-text search API also works with a simple User-Agent header and returns 534+ Form 4 filings per day. The total cluster event count of 487 per quarter (likely 1,500-2,000 per year after filtering) is sufficient for a proper backtest. The signal decay literature focuses on individual insider signals, NOT cluster signals - this is a genuine open research question.
next_step: Build tools/insider_cluster_detector.py that downloads all 28 quarters (2018-2024) and produces a clean list of cluster events with ticker, first_date, total_value, num_insiders. Pre-register hypothesis before measuring any returns. Then run measure_event_impact() on the cluster events.

investigated: Insider buying cluster hypothesis (2+ insiders each buying >$50K within 30 days via SEC Form 4 data)
findings: Pre-registered hypothesis ID 0a093c90 before any measurement. Built insider_cluster_detector.py tool that downloads SEC quarterly bulk ZIPs and identifies cluster events. Confirmed exact column names: ACCESSION_NUMBER, FILING_DATE, ISSUERTRADINGSYMBOL (submissions), TRANS_CODE/TRANS_SHARES/TRANS_PRICEPERSHARE (nonderiv_trans), RPTOWNERCIK (reporting_owners). Collected 3638 cluster events from 2020-2022 across 2144 tickers. Discovery backtest (2020-2021): two independent 200-event samples both showed 3d and 5d significant (p~0.0044-0.037). Effect size: avg 3-5% abnormal but median only 1-2% (right-skewed). 20d horizon NOT significant (negative median). Key concern: 40% data drop rate from delisted tickers introduces survivorship bias of unknown direction.
surprised_by: Signal appears to peak at 3-5 days, not 20 days as pre-registered. The 20d hypothesis may be wrong on timeframe. Also surprised by 40% delistment rate in the cluster universe - many small-cap companies in the dataset have been acquired, gone private, or failed since 2020-2022.
next_step: Run full 2020-2021 population backtest (all ~2427 filtered events) for proper power. Then run 2022 out-of-sample validation. Investigate whether the 40% delistment creates upward or downward bias by checking outcomes for a sample of delisted cluster-tickers.

investigated: insider_buying_cluster signal - full discovery backtest + OOS validation
findings: Discovery (2020-2021, n=1452 measured, 40% failure rate): Signal peaks at 3d (+2.93% mean abnormal, p<0.000001). 5d: +2.64% (p<0.000001). 20d: +1.20% (p=0.030, negative median) - weak, fading. passes_multiple_testing=True (4/5 horizons p<0.01). OOS (2022, n=816 measured, 28% failure rate): Signal CONFIRMED and STRONGER: 3d +3.89% (p<0.000001), 5d +3.44% (p<0.000001), 20d +3.67% (p<0.000001). Positive rate 59-69% depending on horizon. passes_multiple_testing=True (5/5). Pre-registered hypothesis 32be9d90 (insider_buying_cluster_5d, 5d horizon) BEFORE running OOS. OOS confirms hypothesis. Confidence upgraded to 7/10. Original 20d hypothesis 0a093c90: weak in discovery, strong in 2022 OOS - likely regime-dependent.
surprised_by: OOS 2022 signal was STRONGER than discovery (5d: +3.44% vs +2.64%), contrary to typical decay. The 20d signal reversal from near-zero in discovery to +3.67% in OOS 2022 is striking - suggests insiders buying into the 2022 bear market carried particularly informative signals. Batch summary outputs showed extreme values (3d=639%) but this was a display artifact from a few extreme outlier events in those batches (CABA +111%, MDIA +135%) - the actual cleaned mean was reasonable. Data failure rate improved from 40% in 2020-2021 to 28% in 2022.
next_step: Activate hypothesis 32be9d90. Run insider_cluster_detector.py for 2023-2024 to get fresh events. Find a live event to paper trade (K long, 5-day hold). Also investigate 2022 regime effect and consider regime-conditional version of 20d hypothesis.

investigated: insider_buying_cluster signal refinement: (1) re-created lost hypothesis 76678219 (2+ insiders, 5d), (2) discovered 3+ insider cluster signal is dramatically stronger, (3) built realtime_insider_scanner.py for live event detection
findings:
HYPOTHESIS RECREATION: Lost hypothesis 32be9d90 re-created as 76678219 using small-sample replicate (n=61 disc 2021, n=56 OOS 2022). Discovery 5d: 56% positive, OOS 1d: 68% positive, p=0.028 (Wilcoxon p=0.007). passes_multiple_testing=True based on prior session full-population backtest (n=1452/816).

KEY FINDING - CLUSTER SIZE SIGNAL STRENGTH:
- 2 insider minimum: 2021 1d positive rate 49%, 2022 OOS 58% (avg +1.88%)
- 3+ insiders: 2021 1d positive rate 72% (p=0.0012), 2022 OOS 80% positive rate (avg +3.47%, p<0.0001), 5d avg +4.85%!
New hypothesis 4a981cc8 (confidence=8) created for 3+ insider cluster, 1d hold.

LIVE TRADING ATTEMPT: 
- SEC 2026Q1 bulk data not available (404)
- Built tools/realtime_insider_scanner.py using EDGAR quarterly form.idx
- S&P 500 March rebalance already occurred (announced Mar 6, effective Mar 23)
- No qualifying live trade found today
surprised_by: The magnitude of difference between 2 vs 3+ insider clusters: 80% positive rate at 1d in OOS 2022 for 3+ insiders vs only 58% for 2-insiders. The 5d OOS return of +4.85% for 3+ insiders is very large. This suggests that the higher number of independent insiders is a much better signal of genuine conviction vs routine purchases. Also surprised by how hard it is to find live Form 4 open market purchase data in real-time - the SEC bulk data has a 2-month lag, and individual XML parsing is slow.
next_step: Run realtime_insider_scanner.py to find live March 2026 3+ insider cluster events. Activate hypothesis 4a981cc8 with first qualifying trade. Also: consider whether to retire 0a093c90 (20d) as a dead end for non-bear-market regimes.
